available_tools.name: searchIssues
available_tools.description: Search across GitHub issues and pull requests using keywords and qualifiers (e.g. repo:owner/repo, is:issue, label:bug, state:open).

available_tools.name: getIssueComments
available_tools.description: Fetches all comments on the specified issue or pull request.

available_tools.name: getRepoIssueComments
available_tools.description: Fetches all comments on issues and pull requests in the specified repository.

available_tools.name: getSingleIssueComment
available_tools.description: Retrieve a specific comment on any issue or pull request by its ID.

available_tools.name: listRepoLabels
available_tools.description: List all labels for the specified repository.
